+
+## Multimodal Semantic Vector Space
+
+Language in RLOS extends beyond text. A **multimodal intake engine** processes text, audio, images, video and gestures, converting them into a shared high‑dimensional space【33635101037775†L184-L221】. Advanced transformers extract salient features from each modality and align them to represent concepts such as a spoken word, a photograph and an emoji of a *dog* in nearby regions of the vector space【33635101037775†L200-L207】. The system uses cross‑modal attention mechanisms to align deictic expressions with gestures or icons【33635101037775†L210-L216】. The unified semantic space enables intersemiotic translation—text‑to‑image, speech‑to‑emoji, or gesture‑to‑meaning—bridging human communication channels.
+
+![Multimodal vector space illustrating audio, text, visual and gesture components mapped into a unified semantic space]({{file:file-RzEghyJiXrMTNMtx2AmdPC}})
+
+## Rhetorical and Cognitive Processing
